ddls:
CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the institution is located */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of institution (e.g., public, private, non-profit, for-profit) */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the institution's website */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the institution was founded */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "location" TEXT /* City where the institution is located */,
  "accreditation" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "inst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the institution the campus belongs to */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the campus */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled at the campus */,
  "campus_type" TEXT /* Type of campus (e.g., main, satellite, online) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Primary funding source (e.g., state, private, federal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campuses_inst_id FOREIGN KEY ("inst_id") REFERENCES institutions ("inst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Description of the income level (e.g., 0 to 30,000, 30,001 to 48,000) */,
  "min_income" INTEGER /* Minimum income for the income level */,
  "max_income" INTEGER /* Maximum income for the income level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition cost */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campus the tuition cost belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tuition cost is for */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the tuition cost */,
  "net_cost" REAL /* Net cost of the tuition cost */,
  "in_state" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cost is for in-state or out-of-state students */,
  "undergraduate" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the cost is for undergraduate or graduate students */,
  "tuition" REAL /* Tuition cost */,
  "fees" REAL /* Additional fees */,
  "room_and_board" REAL /* Cost of room and board */,
  "books_and_supplies" REAL /* Cost of books and supplies */,
  "other_expenses" REAL /* Other related expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_costs_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tuition cost the financial aid belongs to */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level the financial aid belongs to */,
  "aid_amount" REAL /* Amount of the financial aid */,
  "grant" REAL /* Amount of grant aid */,
  "scholarship" REAL /* Amount of scholarship aid */,
  "loan" REAL /* Amount of loan aid */,
  "work_study" REAL /* Amount of work-study aid */,
  "external_aid" REAL /* Amount of external aid (e.g., from non-institutional sources) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES tuition_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, staff, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the financial data */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tuition cost being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the financial data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES tuition_costs ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, published) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tuition cost included in the report */,
  "aid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial aid included in the report */,
  "income_id" INTEGER /* ID of the income level included in the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report detail */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report detail (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES tuition_costs ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_aid_id FOREIGN KEY ("aid_id") REFERENCES financial_aid ("aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_income_id FOREIGN KEY ("income_id") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_id")
)
